top_signals.title: Esper: Hezbollah is 'Spoiler' for US-Iran Deal
top_signals.summary: Former US Defense Secretary Mark Esper joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend and explains how Hezbollah remains a key spoiler to any lasting Iran deal because the group continues attacking Israeli forces and communities, giving Israel justification to keep responding militarily.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statement by President von der Leyen at the joint press conference with President Costa following the meeting of the European Council of June 2026
